titleStmt.title: SII 11.50: original edition by C. R. Krishnamacharlu, R. S. Panchamukhi, N. Lakshminaraya Rao and H. K. Narasimhaswami
No. 50. (B.K. No. 62 of 1926-27). YALI-SIRŪR, GADAG TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT. ON A SLAB SET UP NEAR THE VILLAGE chāvaḍi.

summary.p: The record belongs to the reign of Iṟivabeḍaṅga Satyāśraya, who is stated to have been halting at a place called Śiriparvata (Śrīparvata), at the time of the grant. It mentions the chief Mahāsāmanta Śōbhanarasa (already referred to) with the usual epithets: ‘Kannana-baṇṭa,’ ‘Kaṭaka-prākāra’ and ‘a bee at the lotus feet of Āhavamalladēva.’ He is stated to have been governing over the Huligeṟe Three Hundred, Beḷuvala Three Hundred and Halasige Twelve Thousand (divisions). While his-subordinate Leṅka Bēṇayya was administering the toll-revenue (suṅka) of Sirivura, Soraṭavura Sabbi • • (probably Sabbi ThirtySee Ep. Ind. Vol. XIII p. 319.)and the Two Six Hundred (divisions), Śōbhanarasa gave, at the request of the Eight Gāvuṇḍas and the Sixty Tenants of Sirivura, six mattar of land to Rēvabbe-Goravi of the temple of Mūlasthāna. This charter which is dated Śaka 926, Krōdhin, Paushya, amāvāsyā, Sunday, Sūrya-grahaṇa, having been broken, the gift was renewed later in the thirteenth year of the reign of king Sarvajñachakravartin Bhuvarlōkamalla (mistake for Bhūlōkamalla i.e., Sōmēśvara III) in Kāḷayukta, on Paushya, ba. 7, Sunday, vyatīpāta, Uttarāyaṇa-saṅkramaṇa, by the Mahāpradhāna, Sēnādhipati, Pattaḷakaraṇa, Daṇḍāyada-Heggaḍe and Daṇḍanāyaka, Mahādēvayya, at the request of his brother-in-law Padmarasa who was the Heggaḍe of Śrīpura and a Pradhāna and Kannaḍa-sandhivigrahi, and at the request of certain Gāvuṇḍas and the Sixty Tenants of Muluvalagēri. This later pratiśāsana was given to Amṛitarāśi-Paṇḍita, the then āchārya of the Mūlasthāna temple.
The first of the dates agrees with Sunday (mistake for Saturday), January 13, A.D. 1005 and the second correctly corresponds to A.D. 1138, December 25, Sunday.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© © namastuṅgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē . traiḷōkyanagarāraṁbhamūlastaṁbhā
ya śaṁbhavē . sakaḷakaḷābrahmaṁ śābdikatiḷakaṁ brahmakavicūḍāmaṇi vājikuḷana
bhasthaḷaravi kauśikagōtrapavitraṁ saṁdhivigrahi padmaṁ saṁdhivigrahi padmarasaṁ sivapādaśēkharaṁ
© svasti samastabhuvanāśrayaṁ śrī prithvīvallabhaṁ mahārājādhirāja paramēśvaraṁ paramabhaṭṭāra
ka cāḷukyābharaṇa niṟivebeḍaṅgaṁ śrīmatu satyāśrayadēvaru . kaṁda . cāḷukyatiḷaka
naribhūpāḷasirōnmaṇinighriṣṭacaraṇaṁvinayaṁ pāḷisi satyāśrayabhūpāḷaṁ biṭṭirdda ne
sava siriparvvatadoḷu . biṭṭire . vritta . nijēśvara rmmana kādaṟiya
ṭṭi . gūvayana nōḍisi bhaṭṭuva nekki meṭṭi madēbhahēma maṁ hayamaṁ hiḍi
dotti taṁdu muḷguṁdada bīḍa no mutsavadiṁ nelesirddu sobhana . svasti sama
dhigatapaṁcamahāśabda mahāsāmaṁta somavaṁ pratyakṣabhūriśravaṁ pusi
yilladātaṁ . kaṁnanabaṁṭaṁ kaṭakaprākāraṁ śrīmaddēsaṭagiridurggamallaṁ raṇadhīraṁ śrīmadāha
vamalladēvapādapaṁkajabhramaraṁ . śrī sōbhanarasaru huligeṟe mūnūṟa beḷuvala mū
nūṟuṁ halasige pannircchāsiramuma nāḷuttamire . tatpādapadmōpajīvi leṁka bēṇayyaṁ siri
vura . soraṭavura . sabbi nāgara . Eraḍaṟunūṟaṟa suṁkamuma naṇugajīvita vāḷu
ttire sakanripakāḷātīta saṁvatsara sataṅga 926 neya krōdhi saṁvatsaraṁ pravarttise tadvarśyābhyaṁtara
pauśya damāvāsye yādityavāra sūryyagrahaṇadandu sirivura deṁbarggāvuṁḍagaḷu
vaṟuvattokkaluṁ biṁnapaṁgeyye . śrī sobhanarasaru mūlasthānada rēvabbegoravige dhārāpū
rvvakaṁ muddigeṟeyoḷagaṇa doṁdu tōṁṭakkaṁ . sirigā(ṁ)vuṁḍana holadoḷa goṁdu tōṁṭakkaṁ . holagē
riya paḍuvaṇa karuvageyyiṁdaṁ teṁka lāṟu mattaru keyiṅga maṟuvaṇa maydu gadyā
ṇamaṁ tiṟuvaru . gāvuḍugaḷu vaṟuvattokkaluṁ tōṁṭada loṁdu baḷḷiyaṁ naḍeyisuvaru
© Ā śāsanaṁ schuṭitavāgalu . śrīmatsarvvajñacakravartti bhuvarllōkamalladēva varśada 13 ne
ya kāḷayukta saṁvatsarada puśya bahuḷa 7 . Ādityavāra . vyatīpāta muttarāyaṇa
saṁkramaṇadaṁdu . samastapraśastisahitaṁ śrīmanmahāpradhānaṁ sēnādhipati pattaḷakaraṇaṁ .
daṁḍāyadaherggaḍe daṁḍanāyaka mahādēvayyaṅgaḷuṁ . Avara maydunaṁ śrīpurada
herggaḍe pradhāna kaṁnaḍasaṁdhivigrahi biṁnavattaḷeya padmarasanuṁ Alliya hiriyakēri
ya cirigāvuṇḍanuṁ . taṁbara sāṁyigāṁvuṁḍanuṁ dhavaḷakka sānagā(ṁ)vuṁḍanuṁ muluva
lagēriya Asamagāvuṇḍanu vavara tanmma naycagāvuṁḍanuṁ valli yaṟuvattokkalu
virddu . śrī mūlasthānadēvara nivēdyakkaṁ . tapōdhana rāhāradānakkaṁ khaṁḍasphuṭitajīrṇnō
ddhārakkavāgi muṁni nāṟu mattaṟu keyyoḷa giṁmmattaru keyyumaṁ . muddigeṟeyo
ḷagaṇa tōṁṭamumaṁ sarvvanamasyavāgiyuṁ sarvvabādhāparihāravāgiyu . mēlāda
nāluku mattaru keygaṁ . sirigāvuṁḍana poladoḷagaṇa tōṁṭaka vaṟuvaṇamaṁ tiṟuva
ru . vūraluṁ Eletōṁṭadaloṁdu baḷḷiyaṁ naḍasuvantāgi mūlasthānadācāryya ramritarāśipaṁḍitargge puna
rddattimāḍi dhārāpūrvvakammāḍi pratiśāsanamaṁ koṭṭaru . Ī maryyādeyaṁ kādu naḍevāta vāraṇāsi gaṅgā
sāgara . śrīparvvatameṁba tīrtthasthānaṅgaḷoḷu sāyira kavileyaṁ kōḍuṁ koḷagumaṁ pancaratnado
ḷu kaṭṭisi mahāritvijargge Ubhayamukhi goṭṭa puṇyaphala makkuṁ . Ida naḷidāta ninituma na
ḷida paṁcamahāpātaka nakku . © svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō harēti vasuṁdharāṁ . śaṣṭirvvarṣṣasa
haśrāṇāṁ viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimi . sāmānyōyaṁ dharmmasētu(ṁ) nripāṇāṁ kālēkālē pā
lanīyō bhavadbhiḥ . sarvvānētānbhāginaḥ pārtthivēṁdraḥ . bhūyō bhūyō yācatē rāmabhadraḥ . ©
© hosavura morakēsvara dēvara Ōjana maga siṁgōjana putra gaṇapōjana barepaṁ . mahāśrī .At the top of the slab is a whom is the inscription:—
lakṣmīdēviyuṁ padmarasanuṁ sa-
dāsivanaṁ stutiyisuttirddhapparu
Digital edition of SII 11.50 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
